narrative:
Monroe Township has 1,304 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.1 percentage points.
